Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11093 0 0}Ahh, finally... I'm glad we made time to hang out instead of settling for rushed hellos between classes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}Nice threads, {f 4 1}-kun. You got some pretty good taste.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 3 25 25}Unlike Kaz, who just wears his track jacket everywhere... Embarrassing, honestly. You gotta have clothes that aren't school swag.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11007 0 0}Take me, for example. How's my outfit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe it's just me, but getting called "cute" feels a little patronizing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}But I know you don't mean it like that, so I'll take it as a compliment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko looks kind of embarrassed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11052 0 0}...{f 4 1}-kun, what the heck are you talking about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}What do I look like, a grandma? Geez, you'd think I was wearing a pantsuit... "Mature"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems upset.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I'm not gonna tell you you're wrong or anything, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}I guess I don't usually hang around people who say nice things to each other off the cuff... Thanks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems really happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11067 0 0}Let's wander around a little more and find a bite to eat. But... let's not get takoyaki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}Nothing ruins an outfit like a big flake of seaweed stuck in your teeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We hung out for a while longer[n]before going our separate ways.[n]{f 1 1}
